events.name: Independence Day Weekend
events.notes: Holiday weekend travel. Raise earlier if calendar tightens.

events.name: Labor Day Weekend
events.notes: Strong travel weekend. Watch airport delivery demand.

events.name: SEMA Show
events.notes: Automotive-heavy demand. Trucks, EVs, premium cars may outperform.

events.name: Thanksgiving Week
events.notes: Family travel week. SUVs should be prioritized.

events.name: Christmas and New Year Travel Window
events.notes: High travel window. Price in stages and avoid last-minute underpricing.

events.name: CES
events.notes: Major convention. EVs and premium vehicles may command stronger rates.
